message:
test(fcp-e2e): gcal happy path matches event URL suffix rather than exact path

`gcal_happy_path_connector_suite_passes` counts requests that hit the
mock server at the Google Calendar events endpoint. The existing
assertion compared `request.url.path() == "/calendars/primary/events/
event_e2e_123"`, which broke when the connector learned to prepend a
versioned API root (e.g. `/calendar/v3/calendars/...`) to outgoing
requests — the exact-equality check would then see zero hits and the
test would fail on what is really a path-prefix change.

Switch the filter to `.ends_with("/calendars/primary/events/
event_e2e_123")` and update the assertion message to match
("...ending in...") so the test stays pinned on the part of the URL
that actually identifies the resource (the event id and parent
collection), independent of any future versioning prefix.

No production surface changes; the connector's request routing is
untouched.
